What you can do on thruster

Trade Easier

Trading becomes effortless with Thruster Finance. By enhancing the solid framework of established AMM DEXes, it offers advanced UX features that create a more streamlined and efficient on-chain experience.

Generate Yield

Boost your earning potential with Thruster's advanced liquidity tools and strategic partnerships, fueled by Blast-native yield mechanisms. Liquidity providers (LPs) will enjoy the benefits of ALM integrations and native yield flywheels, while traders can increase their profits through Thruster Treasure.

Token Release

Tap into the best Blast-native tokens with Thruster. Multiple token launchpads are utilizing Thruster to provide traders with access to new offerings. Degens have the opportunity to trade, earn fees, and farm the most exciting tokens on Blast.

Boosts Profit

Unlock a variety of liquidity pool types and Blast-native yield with Thruster. Thruster LPTs are fully fungible, offering a wide range of utilities, from on-chain leverage and collateralization to cutting-edge yield strategies and beyond!
Why Blast?
Blast is an OP Stack rollup bringing a yield-first environment to L2s

Native Yield

By leveraging Lido and Maker, Blast unlocks tens of millions in native yield, reducing the dependency on native incentive spending. This influx of yield accelerates growth and boosts risk appetite across the Blast network, empowering users to explore new opportunities with confidence.

Dev Friendly Environment

Blast creates a thriving ecosystem and a developer-friendly environment, providing top builders with essential tools for success. Thruster is primed to flourish within this dynamic framework.

Ecosystem Potential

Supported by Paradigm and leading DeFi innovators, Blast has fostered a vibrant ecosystem for builders. Thruster is positioned to be the cornerstone of this movement, serving as the DEX and launch platform for the brightest teams within the Blast community.
